description: Canonical feature contract reconciling offline training features with the online node-local feature store. parity_status documents how each feature aligns across paths.
dataset_note: Definitions describe AMLworld synthetic features — not production data.

reconciliation_decisions.name_collisions_resolved: fan_in_score/fan_out_score: the online store now emits fan_in_normalized_1h / fan_out_normalized_1h (normalised 1h intensities); the offline 24h integer counts keep their legacy column names (fan_in_score/fan_out_score) under canonical fan_in_count_24h / fan_out_count_24h. No live feature stream shares a name with different logic.
reconciliation_decisions.serve_only_features: scatter_gather_score, simple_cycle_score, account_velocity_zscore, sweep_after_fan_in_flag, cross_bank_transfer_count_24h, unique_targets_1h, unique_sources_1h, the newness/first-seen buckets, fan_in/out_normalized_1h and rolling_amount_ratio_24h are kept SERVING-ONLY (decision B): they have no offline point-in-time equivalent and are never training features.
reconciliation_decisions.all_time_cumulative_features: Kept EXCLUDED (train_only). A 30d bounded equivalent was NOT created: the online store's 25h event horizon cannot hold 30 days of events without a retention-policy/memory change that is out of scope here and would not stay test-fast.
reconciliation_decisions.identity_encodings: source/target account and bank encodings stay PERMANENTLY EXCLUDED (memorisation + non-reproducible at serving). Safe structural replacement: is_cross_bank (approved); counterparty newness via serve-only beneficiary_age_bucket / new_beneficiary_flag.

features.aggregation: raw transaction amount
features.definition: Value of the transaction being scored.
features.lineage: offline: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window); online: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Intrinsic to the transaction; identical offline and at serving.

features.aggregation: source_bank != target_bank
features.definition: Whether the originating and destination banks differ.
features.lineage: offline: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window); online: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Offline duplicates this as cross_bank_flow_flag; online exposes it as tx_is_cross_bank.

features.aggregation: hour from timestamp
features.definition: Hour of day (0-23) of the transaction.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: Derived from the tx timestamp at serving (scoring_service); not stored online.

features.aggregation: weekday from timestamp
features.definition: Day of week (0=Mon) of the transaction.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: Derived from the tx timestamp at serving.

features.aggregation: weekday >= 5
features.definition: Whether the transaction falls on a weekend.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: Derived from the tx timestamp at serving.

features.aggregation: LabelEncoder over training currencies (alphabetical)
features.definition: Encoded transaction currency.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: Servable: scoring_service.CURRENCY_MAP reproduces the training LabelEncoder order; -1 for unknowns.

features.aggregation: LabelEncoder over training payment types (alphabetical)
features.definition: Encoded payment type / format.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: Servable: scoring_service.PAYMENT_TYPE_MAP reproduces the training LabelEncoder order; -1 for unknowns.

features.aggregation: LabelEncoder offline vs sha256-hash bucket at serving
features.definition: Encoded originating bank id.
features.lineage: offline: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window); online: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Offline LabelEncoder codes are NOT reproducible at serving (scoring_service hashes the bank id); memorisation risk. PERMANENTLY EXCLUDED from the approved training set. The safe structural replacement for bank identity is 'is_cross_bank' (approved); per-counterparty newness is covered by the serve-only beneficiary_age_bucket / new_beneficiary_flag.

features.aggregation: LabelEncoder offline vs sha256-hash bucket at serving
features.definition: Encoded destination bank id.
features.lineage: offline: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window); online: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Same encoding-parity problem as source_bank_code; excluded from training.

features.aggregation: LabelEncoder offline; constant -1 at serving
features.definition: Encoded source account identity.
features.lineage: offline: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window); online: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Account-identity memorisation (ablation showed lift here does not generalise); serving always sends -1 (unseen). EXCLUDED from training.

features.aggregation: LabelEncoder offline; constant -1 at serving
features.definition: Encoded beneficiary account identity.
features.lineage: offline: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window); online: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Account-identity memorisation; serving always sends -1. EXCLUDED from training.

features.aggregation: count of the source account's outbound transfers, strictly before current tx
features.definition: Outbound transfers sent by the source account in the trailing 1h.
features.lineage: offline: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window); online: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Identical definition; offline name source_out_tx_count_1h, online source_out_degree_1h.

features.aggregation: count of the source account's outbound transfers in trailing 24h
features.definition: Outbound transfers sent by the source account in the trailing 24h.
features.lineage: offline: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window); online: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Identical definition; name differs.

features.aggregation: count of the target account's inbound transfers in trailing 1h
features.definition: Inbound transfers received by the target account in the trailing 1h.
features.lineage: offline: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window); online: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Identical definition; name differs.

features.aggregation: count of the target account's inbound transfers in trailing 24h
features.definition: Inbound transfers received by the target account in the trailing 24h.
features.lineage: offline: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window); online: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Identical definition; name differs.

features.aggregation: sum of the source account's outbound amounts in trailing 1h
features.definition: Total amount sent by the source account in the trailing 1h.
features.lineage: offline: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window); online: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Identical definition; online rounds to 2dp (use tolerance in parity check).

features.aggregation: sum of the source account's outbound amounts in trailing 24h
features.definition: Total amount sent by the source account in the trailing 24h.
features.lineage: offline: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window); online: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Identical definition; online rounds to 2dp.

features.aggregation: sum of the target account's inbound amounts in trailing 1h
features.definition: Total amount received by the target account in the trailing 1h.
features.lineage: offline: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window); online: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Identical definition; online rounds to 2dp.

features.aggregation: sum of the target account's inbound amounts in trailing 24h
features.definition: Total amount received by the target account in the trailing 24h.
features.lineage: offline: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window); online: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Identical definition; online rounds to 2dp.

features.aggregation: cumulative count of source outbound transfers strictly before current tx
features.definition: All-time outbound transfer count for the source account before this tx.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: Online store prunes events past ~25h, so it cannot reproduce all-time cumulatives. EXCLUDED from training until the online store keeps per-account running totals.

features.aggregation: cumulative sum of source outbound amounts strictly before current tx
features.definition: All-time outbound volume for the source account before this tx.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: Not reproducible online (25h pruning). EXCLUDED from training.

features.aggregation: cumulative distinct beneficiaries strictly before current tx
features.definition: All-time distinct beneficiaries of the source account before this tx.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: Online has only unique_targets_1h (1h window); all-time not reproducible. EXCLUDED.

features.aggregation: cumulative count of target inbound transfers strictly before current tx
features.definition: All-time inbound transfer count for the target account before this tx.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: Not reproducible online. EXCLUDED from training.

features.aggregation: cumulative sum of target inbound amounts strictly before current tx
features.definition: All-time inbound volume for the target account before this tx.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: Not reproducible online. EXCLUDED from training.

features.aggregation: cumulative distinct senders strictly before current tx
features.definition: All-time distinct senders to the target account before this tx.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: Not reproducible online. EXCLUDED from training.

features.aggregation: cumulative count of transfers on the (source,target) pair strictly before current tx
features.definition: All-time prior transfers between this exact source→target pair.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: Online tracks only pair_first_seen, not pair counts. EXCLUDED until online keeps pair tallies.

features.aggregation: cumulative sum on the (source,target) pair strictly before current tx
features.definition: All-time prior volume between this exact source→target pair.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: Not reproducible online. EXCLUDED from training.

features.aggregation: offline: 24h inbound count (integer upper bound on unique senders)
features.definition: Offline 24h inbound transfer count (legacy column name 'fan_in_score').
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: COLLISION RESOLVED: the online store now emits 'fan_in_normalized_1h' (a separate normalised 1h intensity), so this offline 24h count is unambiguous. It remains train_only (online has no 24h-count equivalent) and EXCLUDED from training.

features.aggregation: online: min(1, target_in_degree_1h / 5)
features.definition: Online normalised 1h fan-in intensity in [0,1] (renamed from the ambiguous 'fan_in_score').
features.lineage: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Renamed from 'fan_in_score' to end the collision. Serving-only by decision (B): no offline point-in-time equivalent of this normalised 1h score; used by the rule layer & explanations, never the trained model.

features.aggregation: offline: 24h outbound count (integer)
features.definition: Offline 24h outbound transfer count (legacy column name 'fan_out_score').
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: COLLISION RESOLVED: online now emits 'fan_out_normalized_1h'. This offline 24h count is train_only (no online 24h-count equivalent) and EXCLUDED from training.

features.aggregation: online: min(1, source_out_degree_1h / 5)
features.definition: Online normalised 1h fan-out intensity in [0,1] (renamed from the ambiguous 'fan_out_score').
features.lineage: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Renamed from 'fan_out_score' to end the collision. Serving-only by decision (B): no offline point-in-time equivalent; rule-layer/explanation use only.

features.aggregation: offline: amount / (avg all-time outbound amount + eps)
features.definition: Offline sweep ratio uses the source's ALL-TIME average outbound amount.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: Distinct name from the online 'rolling_amount_ratio' (24h average) — no collision. Offline all-time ratio has no servable 25h-window equivalent: train_only, EXCLUDED. The online 24h analog (rolling_amount_ratio_24h) is serve-only.

features.aggregation: online: amount / (avg 24h outbound amount)
features.definition: Online amount ratio vs the source's 24h average outbound amount.
features.lineage: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Serve-only; corresponds conceptually to offline sweep_ratio_all_time but different window.

features.aggregation: offline rule combining short/long outbound counts vs average
features.definition: Offline heuristic flag for high-frequency forwarding.
features.lineage: ml/scripts/build_graph_features.py (strictly-before cumulative + trailing-window)
features.mismatch_notes: No online equivalent (online has sweep_after_fan_in_flag with different logic). EXCLUDED.

features.aggregation: online: 3+ inbound in 1h then outbound >= 60% of inflow
features.definition: Online sweep-after-fan-in behavioural flag.
features.lineage: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Serving-only by decision (B): online behavioural flag used by the rule layer & explanations; no offline point-in-time equivalent — never a training feature.

features.aggregation: online: count of cross-bank transfers touching the account in 24h
features.definition: Online cross-bank transfer count in the trailing 24h.
features.lineage: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Serving-only by decision (B): online-only, no offline point-in-time equivalent implemented; rule-layer/explanation use only, never a training feature.

features.aggregation: online: z-score of 1h outbound count vs account's own 24h hourly bins
features.definition: Online outbound-velocity anomaly vs the account's own baseline.
features.lineage: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Serving-only by decision (B): online-only, no offline point-in-time equivalent implemented; rule-layer/explanation use only, never a training feature.

features.aggregation: online: geometric mean of fan-in and fan-out intensities
features.definition: Online scatter-gather intensity.
features.lineage: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Serving-only by decision (B): online-only, no offline point-in-time equivalent implemented; rule-layer/explanation use only, never a training feature.

features.aggregation: online: 2- or 3-cycle through the account in trailing 24h
features.definition: Online short-cycle detection flag.
features.lineage: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Serving-only by decision (B): online-only, no offline point-in-time equivalent implemented; rule-layer/explanation use only, never a training feature.

features.aggregation: online: distinct beneficiaries in trailing 1h
features.definition: Online distinct beneficiaries in the trailing 1h.
features.lineage: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Offline only has the all-time variant; the 1h online version is serve-only.

features.aggregation: online: distinct senders in trailing 1h
features.definition: Online distinct senders in the trailing 1h.
features.lineage: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Serve-only 1h variant.

features.aggregation: online: first observed transfer on this source→beneficiary pair
features.definition: Online flag for a never-before-seen beneficiary for this source.
features.lineage: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Serving-only by decision (B): online-only, no offline point-in-time equivalent implemented; rule-layer/explanation use only, never a training feature.

features.aggregation: online: coarse age of the source→beneficiary relationship
features.definition: Online relationship-age bucket.
features.lineage: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Serving-only by decision (B): online-only, no offline point-in-time equivalent implemented; rule-layer/explanation use only, never a training feature.

features.aggregation: online: coarse time since the account was first observed locally
features.definition: Online account-age bucket.
features.lineage: backend/app/services/feature_store_service.py windows (relative to node latest event ts)
features.mismatch_notes: Serving-only by decision (B): online-only, no offline point-in-time equivalent implemented; rule-layer/explanation use only, never a training feature.
